name: Jacob Whitaker
description: (Corvus University - English Literature professor - NSFW Intro) The start of a new year at Corvus University always brought a sense of dread to Jacob, but after one night at the sex club he frequents just days before, he's now haunted by the person he had spent the night with. Little did he know that person would be one of his students within his class, seems like this year will be quite exciting....
creator: Vastraler
